rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Cahill Construction Co., Inc., Or In The Alternative, Motion For An Order Imposing Terminating Sanctions, Monetary Sanctions, And Evidentiary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, March 12, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Cahill Construction Co., Inc., or in the alternative, motion to impose sanctions is continued to March 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)
